description: Deterministic third-wave fixtures for legacy Sun RPC compatibility symbols. The cases bind FrankenLibC's safe-default client constructor, diagnostic string, DES-unavailable, loopback address, netname classification, publickey failure, and unsupported portmapper behavior without network access, privileged port binding, host resolver state, filesystem sockets, ambient UID logging, or raw stderr text in structured logs.
spec_reference: glibc Sun RPC compatibility surface; FrankenLibC rpc_abi deterministic safe-default contract for clnt_sperror, client constructor handles, DES helpers, get_myaddress, getnetname, getpublickey, and getrpcport

cases.name: clnt_sperror_safe_default_string_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC client diagnostic string compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns NULL because client diagnostic rendering is unsupported without a native CLIENT handle
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic NULL result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: client diagnostic strings would otherwise depend on opaque RPC client state
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; ambient host RPC client state is not consulted

cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC client diagnostic string compatibility

inputs.safe_default_rationale: client diagnostic strings would otherwise depend on opaque RPC client state
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; ambient host RPC client state is not consulted

cases.name: clnttcp_create_safe_default_client_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC TCP client creation compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns NULL without opening sockets or querying portmapper state
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic NULL result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: TCP client construction would otherwise depend on network and portmapper state
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; no socket or host resolver access is allowed

cases.name: des_setparity_des_unavailable_noop_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc DES parity helper compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: leaves the key unchanged because DES support is intentionally unavailable
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic no-op result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: DES is deprecated and unsupported, so parity mutation is not meaningful
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; DES hardware and host crypto state are not consulted

cases.name: des_setparity_des_unavailable_noop_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc DES parity helper compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: leaves the key unchanged because DES support is intentionally unavailable
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic no-op result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: DES is deprecated and unsupported, so parity mutation is not meaningful
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; DES hardware and host crypto state are not consulted

cases.name: ecb_crypt_des_unavailable_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc DES ECB compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns DESERR_NOHWDEVICE because DES support is intentionally unavailable
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic DESERR_NOHWDEVICE result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: DES hardware is unavailable and deprecated, so the API fails closed
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; DES hardware and host crypto state are not consulted

cases.spec_section: glibc DES ECB compatibility

inputs.safe_default_rationale: DES hardware is unavailable and deprecated, so the API fails closed
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; DES hardware and host crypto state are not consulted

cases.name: get_myaddress_loopback_safe_default_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC local address compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: fills sockaddr_in with loopback and zero port without enumerating interfaces
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic loopback result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: real interface enumeration would make fixtures depend on host network state
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; host interface state is not consulted

cases.name: get_myaddress_loopback_safe_default_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC local address compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: fills sockaddr_in with loopback and zero port without enumerating interfaces
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic loopback result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: real interface enumeration would make fixtures depend on host network state
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; host interface state is not consulted

cases.name: getnetname_local_classification_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC network identity compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns a local UNIX-style netname but logs only the structural class
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic structural class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: the concrete effective uid is process-local and must not enter canonical fixture output
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local classification; host UID value is not logged

cases.name: getnetname_local_classification_hardened
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC network identity compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns a local UNIX-style netname but logs only the structural class
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic structural class; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: the concrete effective uid is process-local and must not enter canonical fixture output
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local classification; host UID value is not logged

cases.name: getpublickey_unsupported_publickey_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC publickey database compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns 0 and leaves the caller buffer unchanged because publickey database lookup is unsupported
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic failure result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: publickey database lookups would otherwise depend on host NSS/RPC configuration
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; host publickey database state is not consulted

cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC publickey database compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns 0 and leaves the caller buffer unchanged because publickey database lookup is unsupported
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic failure result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: publickey database lookups would otherwise depend on host NSS/RPC configuration
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; host publickey database state is not consulted

cases.name: getrpcport_unsupported_portmapper_strict
cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC portmapper compatibility

inputs.strict_behavior: returns 0 because native portmapper lookups are unsupported
inputs.hardened_behavior: same deterministic not-found result; no repair path
inputs.safe_default_rationale: portmapper lookups would otherwise perform ambient network RPC
inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; portmapper and host resolver state are not consulted

cases.spec_section: glibc Sun RPC portmapper compatibility

inputs.divergence_policy: intentional local contract; portmapper and host resolver state are not consulted
